title: Celebrating Canada’s Seniors Act
description: Celebrating Canada’s Seniors Act (Celebrating Canada’s Seniors Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Celebrating Canada’s Seniors Act .

provisions.title: Designation
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each year, October 1 is to be known as National Seniors Day.

provisions.title: Not holiday or non-juridical day
provisions.content: 3 For greater certainty, National Seniors Day is not a holiday or a non-juridical day.
